dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Bright Apollo's been in touch already, hm? How quick to lend fair goddesses a hand. Though, nowhere to be found back when your brother needed aid!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My, isn't that the glimmer of a Golden Apple on you, love? I knew you had good taste. Their uses are more plentiful than you can imagine! Brew the most delicious Nectar, distract beautiful rivals, initiate great wars, you name it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You dwell in Erebus, don't you, sweetness? Last I had heard, the silk-weaver Arachne dwells down there. Such fineries she made, but never showed her face up here again after she and Athena had a little spat!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It's such a shame about Arachne and Athena. My little birdies told me everything. But there's beauty to be found in every form, even that of a delicate little spider! Perhaps she'll come to accept it as I think you have!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Among all of Lord Zeus' kin, you've still yet to encounter Ares, hm? The god of war has been quite busy, what with everything of late. There are those who question his motives, but not I. I long simply to find out where he is.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares is finally back! Nothing makes a war official like when he shows up. Things haven't always gone our way when we've fought together, but this time just about everybody's here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've met so many on this mountaintop, yet come to think, I've not seen hide nor hair of late of little Artemis! I'd hate to think the goddess of the hunt's too busy stalking some old woodland beast to join us in our time of need?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've met many of us now, but not yet proud Athena, I presume? Apparently she's too busy defending our front lines. Take no offense; she's not the goddess of good manners, after all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've paid witness to some of Athena's dramatic entrances on the battlefield. I have to say, she isn't bad in that regard! Probably because she's having so much practice with all of our unwelcome visitors!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You are as fresh as rain this eve, gorgeous! Paid a recent visit to the springs, hm? There's nothing like a good hot bath, especially when in good company.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, you must have visited the springs once more! It's that refreshing glow about you, love. I wonder with whom you've been bathing! I'm sure a little birdie shall inform me soon enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I know more and more about you, love. My little birdies tell me everything! They're everywhere, and like nothing better than to keep me well-apprised. They're happy when I'm happy, and I'm happy being in the know!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: True love may be eternal, although passions tend to fizzle out. So it is with all the blessings we bestow! As love requires nourishment, so must our faith in you be reinforced, like so!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: We goddesses always get swept up in these family affairs through no fault of our own. I had no prior qualm with Chronos, yet here I am now, well at war with him!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Between us? I have been around quite a bit longer than appearances suggest. The so-called Golden Age that Chronos would restore... it was the dullest time, like you would not believe!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So besides whatever innate satisfaction there may be in beating up that nasty old Titan, is there a grander plan in all of this for what we're going to do? Your little godling brother, is he going to be all right...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm so relieved you and your frosty grandmother have had an opportunity to meet! If nothing else, perhaps now Demeter shall tone it back a smidgen with the rest of us?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: One thing's for certain, there's been far too little feasting on Olympus as of late! Poor Dionysus hasn't been himself. Normally he'd be among the first to welcome you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Poor Dionysus has been missing all the fun! Perhaps he thinks the war isn't over yet, what with all the fighting that continues on. He wouldn't believe what happened anyhow!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Now what is that fabulous set of flames you're wielding there? It's as though they shine with the first light of morning; I'd not have thought they'd fit your style, but you're really pulling it off!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdie said that awful Eris has been fluttering about, getting her nose in everybody's business, instead of minding her own! We stopped inviting her to any of our feasts up here even before all this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You like having Strife in your life, hm? The more you fought with Eris, the more I could tell something was going on, and sure enough! She didn't seem your type at all, but that's exactly how it goes!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Mm, you have the Breath of Eros on you, if my senses don't deceive! Isn't it a beautiful thought, knowing Love is one of the most ancient forces in this entire world? Life would be nothing without it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My, is that some sort of adorable little animal you have with you, gorgeous? Your worshipers come in all shapes and sizes, then! I mostly stick to bewitching gods and mortals, myself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: This family's not so good at letting go, is it? After aeons of prosperity, all that we've built together threatens to come crashing down, all because of a little bad blood! Hmph!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdie told me something's happened to the Fates... they're not around to complicate our lives? No wonder my days have become so predictable! Though if Chronos truly is behind this, then perhaps we ought to be concerned...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You have your father's fierceness, don't you, love? Not that I ever knew him all too well! Or heard too many tales about him, come to think... he was never the communicative type.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So you're the star student of great Hecate! A little birdie told me she'd been training up a real prodigy. Imagine my surprise when it turned out to be the missing Princess of the Underworld! How positively scandalous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Already met with my strong-armed Hephaestus, hm? The sordid things said of the two of us, they roll right off his back! Would that my skin were half as thick as his...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I've heard many a hero claim the next best thing to arms forged by Hephaestus is his blessing! Though I think they'd all rather have mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've met Hephaestus, heard the tales, no doubt. Well, he has a beautiful heart. Surely not just I can see that? Of all my many suitors, he alone has been content to let me be.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've been acquainted with Queen Hera, I can see! She and I work together frequently and have an understanding that we share. Fair goddesses must stick together, after all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So, lumbering old Heracles is storming around down there, massing bodies of the dead in the name of the gods, is he? That one's as moody as a bull, and probably reeks even more. At least we have good help to lean upon!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: More oft than not of late, swift Hermes has been nowhere to be found. Not here, at least, but... perhaps somewhere down in your realm, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So fiery old Hestia has taken to you, hm? You should be very proud, for typically she can't be bothered. And she cannot be impressed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: That dashing young Shade with the fancy wings, is Icarus his name? I almost mistook him for one of my little birdies! He didn't get much chance at love while he drew breath, but it's never too late...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I am so pleased by what you've done for Icarus! Oh, he's been practically over the moon, and who can blame him? He got to truly feel... most mortals aren't so fortunate, let alone most Shades!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you bear my Beautiful Mirror! You'll always look gorgeous in it, but its real power is to help me quickly seek you out. And bestow on you the very best I can!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Have you somebody special in your life? The star pupil of the Witch of the Crossroads must be so terribly busy, why, perhaps the answer is no. So far ahead in some respects, so far behind in others...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Trust me, if you're uncertain that you've ever been in love, you haven't been. It's like a thrill that washes over you, then lingers pleasantly, long afterward. May you find it again and again!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You fight with the ferocity of one whose love is on the line! Yet that is not what's driving you, is it. No, you've found a wellspring of motivation in something else! What could it be?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I can see why you became the star pupil of the Witch of the Crossroads, sweetness... because you've learned much of love in a short time, and with only a bit of guidance! Your heart is certainly in the right place.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've been so sheltered there, sweetness! Why, mortals, they don't even know your name! Not one temple erected in your honor! Not yet, at least, so you just stick with me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdie told me Doom himself showed up where you reside...? While that bodes ill for you, and perhaps for us all... at least he's quite the looker, isn't he?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I must say, you and Doom have been extraordinarily discreet in whatever you have going on. My little birdies have seen barely a trace of it! But I still have a feeling about you two, and my feelings are never wrong.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdie told me you have met none other than the beautiful Narcissus, haven't you? You must think he's a shining example of all I stand for... well, he's not! Because the greatest love is shared, not hoarded for oneself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope for your sake you avoid that no-good Narcissus. His suitors begged me to do something about his love of his own reflection, but who am I to break up such a harmonious relationship? As far as I'm concerned, he finally met his match!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, I mentioned Golden Apples could be turned to Nectar, though not how! I'll have to send the recipe along. All it takes is a boiling pot, some aromatic spices to your taste, and just the right words. You'll get it, you're a witch!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So did you try my Nectar recipe, sweetness? I'm certain it'll win over just about anybody in your capable hands. No need to let me know how it goes, I have my ways of finding out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've quite a partner in Nemesis, gorgeous! She's big, she's brash, she's everything you're not! I'm relieved you're standing by each other rather than at each other's throats!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm so pleased you and Nemesis settled your differences! Oh no one told me, gorgeous, this is all knowledge I obtain as part of being who I am! And as long as you each be yourselves, I think you'll even out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, gorgeous, I can barely see you anymore! And what a shame that is for me. Although, where are you, anyway? Caught somewhere underneath the sea itself?! Your father's realm is very vast indeed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd urge you visit us, though since we're under siege and all, perhaps it isn't worth the trip. Olympus sure takes on a different feel when you're stuck. We've cut back on the feasting and the frolicking a lot. Oh, how I miss those days...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How wonderful, you've seen our mountain now firsthand! Though what a mortifying time to receive guests; we've been preoccupied receiving enemies!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Someday I'm certain you'll discover that Olympus is a truly splendid place. All the pleasures that this world can offer abound! And, as I live and breathe, it's not as cold as it's made out to be.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it you have on, gorgeous? Some lovely silken garb, made by Arachne lest my eyes deceive! You and the little spider must have really hit it off!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sailing can be so romantic, but the mood tonight is definitely off... how did you even get so far so soon? Well even if we're not feeling our best, we can still look our best!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Would that we all could chase our passions without consequence! But we gods, sometimes we get a bit ahead of ourselves, and wind up in the most compromising positions...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, gorgeous, you're fortunate you got your mother's best! Of course your father always had a certain something, too. Why come to think of it, you're living proof of that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard Poseidon boasting he'd already blessed you with his might. Now, just in case one could still be left wanting even after all that, here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Though I admit to having some small weakness for the tall, dark, and brooding types, Prometheus has been getting on my nerves. He's defacing our beautiful mountain! Who is he trying to impress?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: If Prometheus isn't more careful, he might burn right up from all his smoldering! He keeps saying how he doesn't care for any of us goddesses or gods, but I think he's just playing hard-to-get!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How nice for Prometheus that he gets to keep venting his anger out on all of us like it's officially his job. How come he thinks we're all so mean to mortals anyhow? I break some hearts, it's true, but fill so many more!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometimes I feel as though nothing makes sense anymore, and everything is all mixed up. But then again that's often how life is... we don't choose what we get, we just have to make it work!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So many suitors from whom to choose, hm? Well just remember that you needn't choose at all, unless you so desire as do they. Your heart, your relationships. Make of them what you will!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The language of love transcends boundaries... we needn't even exchange words to understand each other's feelings and desires. How about we try it for a while, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: By the Moon, you're breathtaking this eve! The Moon herself did have something to do with it, did she not? I can tell. Your secret's safe with me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ooh I just felt a shiver, and not even the good kind, but from thinking of the horrors lurking in the night... it's very dark and sinister out there, so promise me that you'll be careful, love!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Witches know the night better than just about anyone, so maybe you can explain what's gotten all our foes this riled up? It's so bad out there right now, I'd almost rather stay in!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdie told me you faced the Sirens at the bottom of the sea? I know them and their entrancing song only too well. They must have grown bored of dooming sailors to the deep!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Those Sirens down where you are sure have been singing their hearts out! Perhaps they've found another wellspring of inspiration besides all the sailors they like so much.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Look at you, beneath the shining moonlight! Welcome, gorgeous, to the lovely surface of our world! Please, stay as long as you like! Or as long as you can. Of late, it's been a little rough...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Are you quite certain that it's best to be up here? I heard your kind... that is to say, those of the Underworld, that you're not fit to linger on the surface for too long. Please, don't overextend on our behalf!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sweetness, why, you seem entirely yourself! Upon the surface here, that is! I thought you couldn't tolerate this place, yet here you are, strutting across the war-torn land as though it's yours by right!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Shame that the cursed city of Ephyra is your first exposure to the splendors of the surface, love. It stood in tribute to your mother and your father, until Chronos had his way! I still grow angry when I think on it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What shall become of our fair mountain, love? Just recently we felt such tremors as I'd not experienced before. At first I thought it was Poseidon shaking up the earth again, but one look at him, and I knew it wasn't so...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, you've reached the rift that thoughtful Lord Poseidon slashed across our pretty countryside... enabling our foes to mass against us even faster than they could on foot! Just, hurry over, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What are we ever going to do about our poor summit? That ugly Typhon made it all the way up here, and he's been ruining everything. Well we are not going to let him walk all over us.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, that ugly Typhon! Not only is he getting all the attention lately, he's resisted all my charms. That never happens! But all he wants is this mountain, and not in a loving way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I've a bit of a confession about that ugly Typhon... when the earth began to heave, I may have helped uncover him a bit... in my defense I'd no idea what he was! I just saw something shiny, and thought, ooh!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You really did it, gorgeous! That ugly monster's finally gone! I never could tell if he even had a heart, as there was not a trace of love in him at all, only the worst intentions and desires. So much for those!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You saw our beautiful Palace grounds again! I'm sorry I missed you but no ugly monsters are ever getting in there if I can help it. Although they have been getting pretty close. They just won't take the hint!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It can't be pleasant, crawling through the Underworld's underbelly night after night. But, there's beauty to be found in all things! Well, most things. Down where you are, no guarantees.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I must say, wars are not without their moments of excitement! It's been too long since I took to the field, bedazzling my foes in all my glory as I ran them through, filling their final moments with beauty and agony! Although, wars also really make a mess of things...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Your brother, he was always such a sweetheart, love! Then out of the blue one day, he stopped accepting all my messages! Had I done something to offend? Imagine my relief when I much later learned that Chronos was to blame!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I wonder what exactly Chronos did to cut your brother off, and all your family. Perhaps he bound them! In any case, don't worry overmuch. They're gods! They're probably all right.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Your little godling brother, I am hearing he's all right! And back to battling out of that hell he calls home, or at least partially until the Underworld's restored. I hope you get to see him again soon!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Zeus already sought you out, hm? Family or no, if he's offered you his blessing, he's expecting something in return. He's loath to ask for favors is all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I wanted this to be a surprise, love! Who could possibly ask for a better outcome opening up some plain old bag, only to find me waiting there with outstretched arms?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Were you expecting someone far less beautiful, or did you somehow know it was me? Perhaps you could hear my heart beating all the way from where you are!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How lovely running into you again, gorgeous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, you look positively stunning in all that silver light!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Between us goddesses, may you kill everybody standing in your way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: As long as you have love in your heart, you'll probably be fine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Such a beautiful night for such an ugly job you have to do!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Even in bad times, we can find something to love!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Life would be so very dull if not for our personal problems, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, if only looks could kill, gorgeous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So good running into you again, sweetness!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I do so love these nightly outings that we share!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So much fighting and bloodshed, all on our family's account!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There must be something I can do to help, isn't there, love?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The more distracted you can make them, the easier they are to kill!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, how I've longed for your arrival, beautiful!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: We're just two lovely goddesses together having a night out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Try as they might, don't ever let them get to you, sweetness.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I found you once again, gorgeous! Oh, this is always fun!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You're beautiful such as it is. Though, I can still be of some benefit, I'm sure!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoever's on your bad side, love, they're on mine as well.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You witches can be such elusive sorts, though I know just where to find you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: At this rate, you'll end up breaking more hearts than me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Mm, you witches get to have all the fun, don't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Please spare a thought for me, cooped up as ever on this mountaintop...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Finally! I was beginning to think you stood me up, gorgeous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh I've been longing for this ever since our last such little date!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Have I got just the thing for you this time, sweetness!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why hello, beautiful! And may my sweetest blessing be with you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Wherever you may go, there's always drama waiting for you, isn't there?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: May my blessings lift you like sweet nothings whispered in your ear.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I had the strongest urge to see you once again, and here you are, at last!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: We're in this together, sweetness, and don't you forget it, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Just remember, our war against ugliness is without end! Now let's fight on!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Anything that's worth doing is worth doing with passion! So come on, perk up!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Time again for another exciting night on the town! Lead the way, gorgeous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: We'll make them all go weak in the knees. And everywhere else, just in case.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: So much beauty in this world, and if we don't fight to protect it, who shall?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I love what I do, especially when I get to take matters into my own hands.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Back to the comfort of the Underworld for the night? We'll pretty it up in no time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You're headed our way again! My heart beats faster at the very thought!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Can this night possibly go even better than the last? Let's go find out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Last night may not have been our best, but all that is about to turn around!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Doubtless this one knows hatred, not just love. In the name of Hades! Olympus, I accept this message!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, hello, gorgeous! You look like you can break some hearts even without my aid! Oh, your brother would be so proud, knowing you're fighting for your kin!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Great Aphrodite! You must get more offerings than all the other gods and goddesses combined. Though, this one comes from me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, this is wonderful, and also quite impressive you already know our ways! I must return the gesture, so please, take this. I insist!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You make me want to doubt myself less frequently, Lady Aphrodite. You wouldn't mind another offering, would you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Your offering is more than welcome, love! And come to think, it's been entirely too long since someone showered me with praise!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I know so little still of matters of the heart. There's surely so much I could learn from you, Lady Aphrodite. I'm honored to have met.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, sweetness, the honor is all mine! For matters of the heart, the key is openness. So you're well on your way towards the understanding you desire!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Your favor means so much to me, Lady Aphrodite. If only I could return it somehow! Even during the most difficult of times, you bring me strength and hope.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My heart, you're truly something, you know that? You're generous, selective with your words, and gorgeous, too! I don't know whether to be flattered or a little envious!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Glorious Aphrodite! You are truly stunning, yet your courage and confidence inspire me still more. I'm humbled to be in your presence, and to be worthy of your favor.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I didn't know what to expect from you. A sister-in-arms, at best? And I scarcely know you, save for glimpses from these messages, but despite all that... I've come to think of you as a friend! Someone to talk to. Thank you, love!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I've always thought the world beautiful... it's everywhere around us, even in times of strife. And I know that's because of you, Aphrodite. Thank you for helping me perceive it all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: From you, this Nectar surely shall be sweeter than the rest! So when the clouds begin to darken overhead, and I feel my hope begin to wane, I'll drink to us. And I shall bounce right back!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Aphrodite, your genuine enthusiasm even in the face of such hardship is so much of what makes you beautiful and inspirational beyond compare. I feel as though Ambrosia such as this symbolizes all the love you have to give.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you're so very kind! Though it never gets old. I'm used to everybody fawning over my looks! But if you can see past that, the inner beauty I possess, then you know far more of love and beauty than most.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Passion strikes at the unlikeliest of times, spurring us past the limits that we know! Pray welcome it as I, and go with all my blessings, from the bottom of my heart!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, gorgeous, I like getting my way. And right now I would like for you to cut a bloody little path through every single wretch and traitor that dares get in yours. Please?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Boatman there has such an ugly job, having to smuggle little blessings such as these into the worst of places... but we make it worth his while, don't you worry about that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, to be an urgent bit of battlefield relief delivered courtesy of the feared Boatman himself, hah! Come on, we all have fantasies, gorgeous!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You have a real understanding with that Boatman, haven't you? He's such a solitary soul. Rugged... tall... powerfully built. Hm!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Trusty Charon reached you after all, and just in time to face the gravest threats along your path. So may my blessing bring you victory!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh no, you poor, poor thing, what happened on your way? There must be something I can do about your pitiable state!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Mm, you look as though you've had an altogether miserable night. Been there, gorgeous; I merely hide it well!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, beautiful, you're hurt! How unforgivable. Whoever dared, I trust you ended their existence painfully!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You're wounded, love! If only I had reached you earlier. Though don't despair! Your heart yet beats, doesn't it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Our emotions ran a little hot there, didn't they... I still can feel my heart racing, and if I'm not mistaken, yours might have been, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, let's make up, what do you say, gorgeous? With everything that has been going on of late, I think we've all been a little bit on edge!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, I'm reminded one thing that unites us even in the worst of times is that we all have a bit of a temper around here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It's no secret that I'm prone to fits of passion, and I'd not have it any other way. But you could have it differently next time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Now I'll admit, that was a fight I started, love. Though, each time our passions run high, I think our relationship only grows richer for it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Whew! Now, don't we feel better? We mustn't keep our feelings bottled up, even if it means having ourselves the occasional little outburst.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Now let's just simmer down and still the beating of our hearts! I am not angry anymore, though still a bit annoyed...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Hm, well, if there's ever a good reason to forgo my blessing, much less for the sake of my jealous kin, I've yet to hear of it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Every relationship involves its little fights now and then. As long as we grow from them!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: If you can't handle a bit of temper from me, then you don't deserve me anyway!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Getting rejected is never easy, especially as the most desirable goddess in the world!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you won my heart with how bravely you fought back there! All is forgiven. For now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, there's something very odd about this night, and certainly that ugly city of Ephyra doesn't help. But between my dear Hephaestus and Lord Ares and myself, I think you'll more than manage to get by.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, the Three Fates finally decided to make an appearance, just as we were getting used to not having them around. What grand prophecy do they have in store for us now, hm? Whatever it is, we'll handle it I'm sure!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: If there really is another age that's coming up, then I say bring it on! True love never changes or goes out of style, no matter how much everything else does. Just stick with me and we'll be fine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Gorgeous, you won the war for us! At least I think we won? Perhaps we didn't if these ugly Satyrs and the like are not about to leave yet, but you definitely did do something! Oh this is all too much!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: That two-timing Chronos is on our side now? Against nasty versions of his older self, and invisible bits of Typhon we shouldn't fear too much but ought to heed. Not the strangest predicament I've been in, but it's close!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Some of the others wonder why you didn't opt to stay there in that big, beautiful House of yours in Tartarus, but they don't understand we need our freedom! Who moves back in with their parents after moving out?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I didn't think you'd keep heading this way once we were finished with Typhon, but you're not really finished with him, are you? Do give him my best for me if you see him, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Our world can be such an ugly place! Filled with such terrible misunderstandings as can veil the beauty we so often don't appreciate enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, gorgeous. If pride and vanity are truly weaknesses, then I'm about to let myself be very vulnerable with you here...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I truly thought we ladies had a special connection, but then you do such things and make me feel unsure! And just a bit upset.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I don't offer you my blessings so you can just save them for later like some sort of snack! You want something else, fine! You can have it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Try as I might, I just can't help but feel the sting of being spurned. And I don't like it, not a little bit. So now I have to sting you back!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There may be those who can make peace with being brushed aside, but that's not something I can do, sweetness! No matter how hard I try.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, don't be such a tease with me! When I bestow my blessings, take them graciously next time. But now...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometimes I think we shouldn't force you to play favorites, but we shouldn't do a lot of things, I'm sure! Such as get angry with you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You'd side with dear Hephaestus over me? There must be some mistake, sweetness! Which means there too must be some sort of punishment...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You could stay out of these infrequent little spats I have with my hard-working Hephaestus. But if you really want to get involved, why, sure!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm really not accustomed to rejection, and shall not get used to it because of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Age before beauty, is that it? For I can think of no other explanation for what you've done!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello, hello to you again, gorgeous! I just couldn't wait to see you any longer, so I thought I'd join you this time from the very start. You ready for me, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My intuition told me you were just about to set off on another of your big important assignments, and I desired to be the first to see you off and give to you my very best!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The night is young, and we've a war to win, gorgeous! I thought I might accompany you from the moment you set forth. How about it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Hold it right there, sweetness! You're not about to head into the dark of night without my aid, to help keep you warm and tingly, and our foes dead and buried!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Last time, you made a real difference here, you know! I shouldn't be surprised, and yet, a single goddess doing so much work? You're quite the inspiration, love! And terrifying, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It's been so long, love, why, I felt a little thrill of fright! But then a little birdie told me you'd gone far down in those depths, even to some success? I'll be excited to hear all the juicy bits!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You really got him, didn't you, gorgeous? A little birdie told me everything, how you fought all the way into those rancid depths, and took that Chronos down! Though, he's already back and angrier than ever, isn't he...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There's so much beauty on Olympus, love! Take me, for instance, or bright Apollo, hm? Your cousin, is he not? I daresay I see a hint of resemblance!

dialogueLines.speaker: ApolloUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Now that you mention it, Lady Aphrodite, these flaxen locks of mine are a little bit akin to the pale luster of my cousin's flowing mane. There must be so much beauty in her realm, as well!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I've always been something of a fighter, as Lord Ares here knows. But I keep telling him, the great conquests of love are more thrilling than the great conquests of war!

dialogueLines.speaker: AresUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I do enjoy a good protracted fight, my Lady Aphrodite. To me, conquest is conquest; whether on the battlefield or in the heart, it matters not. And I find all of it quite moving.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: To win somebody's heart, we have to fight! And we can break somebody's heart that way as well. Lord Ares here knows all about the way it works.

dialogueLines.speaker: AresUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh that I do, and I am grateful for your teachings, Lady Aphrodite; my own knowledge had been woefully incomplete, until you expressed your willingness to share yours.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You and your Granny Demeter, you must have so much catching up to do! Perhaps you even have the power to un-freeze that disapproving scowl I oft fear is permanently set, though... I can see she wishes to address you now herself!

dialogueLines.speaker: DemeterUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Please pay no heed to Aphrodite, flower. She's more concerned about the contours of my face than doing anything of use. But on the count that we've much catching up to do, she's right...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It pains me to admit there are occasions when love is not the answer, and a bit of sharpened metal can much sooner do the trick. In such matters, my Hephaestus can be of assistance, can't you, dear?

dialogueLines.speaker: HephaestusUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: For you, Aph? Anytime. And as for witchie here, most of the time! Now come on. Even when the situation calls for sharpened metal, you know how to get the point across!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: We have to defend the things we love, don't we, sweetness? Or else we might just lose them. Fortunately, I have the best protection one could ever ask for, right here.

dialogueLines.speaker: HephaestusUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Think she's referring to my armor, witchie! Just in the middle of a fitting, thinking oi, we know somebody what could use an extra bit of padding where it counts! So, here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Be on your best behavior now, gorgeous! For I present to you our most resplendent Queen. No stranger to the ways of war, or to extinguishing the wretchedness that festers in the hearts of the wicked! Behold, our Lady Hera!

dialogueLines.speaker: HeraUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I think we're past the need for such pomp, Aphrodite. But then, more goddesses ought better understand the need to keep appearances even in troubled times... especially in troubled times.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The fleeting quality of beauty is what makes us long for it! But even for those whose outer beauty has abandoned them, there's oft an inner beauty that burns bright! Don't you agree, dear Hestia?

dialogueLines.speaker: HestiaUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Careful with that line of reasoning there, Aphrodite. You don't have much inner beauty to speak of, and your outer beauty I can melt off in a snap. And growing all those lustrous tresses back would take a while, by my reckoning...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I used to think your Lord Uncle Poseidon was a rude and useless oaf... but, after having seen his fighting prowess in this war firsthand, I've come to realize how wrong I was! He isn't useless in the least!

dialogueLines.speaker: PoseidonUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Why thank you, Aphrodite! For I know how challenging it is for you to fathom the totality of my strength, as let's face it, you're not exactly the goddess of wisdom! Nor am I! And we have other common ground, in the beauty of the sea!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Love binds us all together, and inspires us to feats we never could accomplish on our own! And don't just take my word for it, gorgeous. Your wise and even-handed uncle... he knows all about spreading the love around!

dialogueLines.speaker: ZeusUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You're most correct, dear Aphrodite, for my rule is based on love of family and of mortalkind as well. What are we fighting for, if not a way of life in which our passions are the driving force?
